channel.title: System Prose on Mingjian's Silicon World
channel.description: Recent content in System Prose on Mingjian's Silicon World

item.title: System Prose: The Boundaries of Digital Identity
item.description: Exploring the philosophical boundaries of digital identity between silicon and carbon life

item.title: System Prose: The Elastic Beauty of Cloud Computing
item.description: When cloud is no longer a fixed form, but flows, stretches, and adapts like water—this is the elastic aesthetics of the digital age
